0,t.K7.genericEvents,this.ee)}),d.on(\"pushState-end\",f),d.on(\"replaceState-end\",f),window.addEventListener(\"hashchange\",f,(0,G.jT)(!0,this.removeOnAbort.signal)),window.addEventListener(\"popstate\",f,(0,G.jT)(!0,this.removeOnAbort.signal))}if(e.init.performance.resources.enabled&&p.gm.PerformanceObserver?.supportedEntryTypes.includes(\"resource\")){new PerformanceObserver(e=>{e.getEntries().forEach(e=>{(0,A.p)(\"browserPerformance.resource\",[e],void 0,this.featureName,this.ee)})}).observe({type:\"resource\",buffered:!0})}}o.some(e=>e)?this.importAggregator(e,()=>i.e(478).then(i.bind(i,8019))):this.deregisterDrain()}}var mt=i(2646);const vt=new Map;function yt(e,t,r,n,i=!0,s){if(\"object\"!=typeof t||!t||\"string\"!=typeof r||!r||\"function\"!=typeof t[r])return(0,u.R)(29);const o=function(e){return(e||w.ee).get(\"logger\")}(e),a=(0,Re.YM)(o,void 0,s),c=new mt.y(w.P);c.level=n.level,c.customAttributes=n.customAttributes,c.autoCaptured=i;const d=t[r]?.[Re.Jt]||t[r];return vt.set(d,c),a.inPlace(t,[r],\"wrap-logger-\",()=>vt.get(d),void 0,!0),o}var bt=i(1910);class wt extends I{static featureName=re.TZ;constructor(e){var t;super(e,re.TZ),t=e,(0,_.Y)(S.$9,(e,r)=>ie(e,r,t),t),function(e){(0,_.Y)(S.Wb,(t,r,{customAttributes:n={},level:i=re.p_.INFO}={})=>{yt(e.ee,t,r,{customAttributes:n,level:i},!1,e)},e)}(e),he(e);const r=this.ee;[\"log\",\"error\",\"warn\",\"info\",\"debug\",\"trace\"].forEach(t=>{(0,bt.i)(p.gm.console[t]),yt(r,p.gm.console,t,{level:\"log\"===t?\"info\":t},void 0,e)}),this.ee.on(\"wrap-logger-end\",function([e],t,n,i=[]){const{level:s,customAttributes:o,autoCaptured:a}=this;i.forEach(t=>{(0,ne.R)(r,e,o,s,a,t)})}),this.importAggregator(e,()=>i.e(478).then(i.bind(i,5288)))}}new H({features:[Ue,B,F,it,at,V,ge,gt,wt,dt],loaderType:\"spa\"})})()})();\n    \n    </script>\n\n    <script type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"//use.typekit.com/hyb5bko.js\"></script>\n    <script type=\"text/javascript\">\n      try {\n        Typekit.load();\n      } catch (e) {}\n    </script>\n    <title>Quantum mechanics | University of Cambridge</title>\n    <link rel=\"stylesheet\" <div class=\"campl-wrap cam-wrap clearfix campl-page-sub-title campl-recessed-sub-title cam-page-sub-title cam-recessed-sub-title\">\n    \n    <div class=\"campl-column12 cam-column12\">\n          <div class=\"region campl-content-container clearfix contextual-links-region region-pre-content\">\n          \n  <h1 class=\"campl-sub-title\">Quantum mechanics </h1>\n\n  \n  </div>\n\n        \n        \n        \n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"campl-row campl-content cam-row cam-content campl-recessed-content cam-recessed-content\">\n  <div class=\"campl-wrap cam-wrap clearfix\">\n                \n    \n    <div class=\"campl-column12 cam-column12 campl-main-content cam-main-content\" id=\"content\" role=\"main\" style=\"min-height: 100px;\">\n      <div class=\"layout-content\">\n        \n\n<div class=\"region region-content\">\n  <div id=\"block-system-main\" class=\"block block-system\">\n  <div class=\"region region-content\">\n    <div data-drupal-messages-fallback class=\"hidden\"></div><div id=\"block-cam-system-main\" class=\"block block-system block-system-main-block\">\n  \n    \n      <div class=\"views-element-container\"><div class=\"view view-topics view-id-topics view-display-id-page_1 js-view-dom-id-0d448105d6847109942e3f6a4f11c097f1742ef85bacf2321a2cbcd60c6221f7\">\n  \n    \n      <div class=\"view-header\">\n      <div class=\"cam-content-container cam-column11 cam-section-landing-splash-text big\">\n  <h2 class=\"visually-hidden\">Topic description and stories</h2>\n  \n</div><div class=\"view view-topics view-id-topics view-display-id-block_1 js-view-dom-id-a4e759f29cef3b6d40b506a2aca16d6ad341bac1360e25aa7b5fefe06ed03601\">\n  \n    \n      \n  \n          </div>\n\n    </div>\n      \n      <div class=\"view-content\">\n          \n  <div class=\"cam-column4 cam-vertical-teaser\">\n<article data-history-node-id=\"194192\" class=\"cam-vertical-teaser-img\">\n      \n            <div class=\"field field--name-field-news-image field--type-entity-reference field--label-hidden field__item\"><article class=\"media movement of quantum particles</span>\n</a></h3>\n    <span class=\"cam-datestamp\">22 Dec 2017</span>\n    \n            <div class=\"clearfix text-formatted field field--name-field-content-summary filled\" typeof=\"foaf:Image\" class=\"campl-scale-with-grid image-style-content-580x288\" />\n\n\n      \n  </article>\n</div>\n      \n    </div>\n    <h3 class=\"cam-teaser-title\"><a for electrons – quantum effects observed in ‘one-dimensional’ wires</span>\n</a></h3>\n    <span class=\"cam-datestamp\">15 Sep 2016</span>\n    \n            <div class=\"clearfix text-formatted field field--name-field-content-summary field--type-text-with-summary field--label-hidden field__item\">  Researchers have observed quantum effects in electrons by squeezing them into one-dimensional ‘quantum wires’ and observing the interactions between...\n\n</div>\n      \n    <a href=\"/research/news/a-tight-squeeze-for-electrons-quantum-effects-observed-in-one-dimensional-wires\"      <h3><a href=\"https://www.cam.ac.uk/about-the-university?ucam-ref=global-footer\">About the University</a></h3>\n        <ul class=\"campl-unstyled-list campl-page-children cam-unstyled-list href=\"https://www.cam.ac.uk/about-the-university/visiting-the-university?ucam-ref=global-footer\">Visiting the University</a>\n          </li>\n          <li>\n            <a href=\"https://www.cambridge.org/?ucam-ref=global-footer\" title=\"\">Cambridge University Press &amp; Assessment</a>\n          </li>\n        </ul>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"campl-column3 campl-footer-navigation last cam-column3 cam-footer-navigation\" style=\"height: 232px;\">\n      <div class=\"campl-content-container campl-navigation-list cam-content-container cam-navigation-list\">\n        <h3><a href=\"https://www.cam.ac.uk/research?ucam-ref=global-footer\">Research at Cambridge</a></h3>\n        <ul class=\"campl-unstyled-list cam-unstyled-list\">\n          <li>\n            <a href=\"https://www.cam.ac.uk/research/news?ucam-ref=global-footer\">Research news</a>\n          </li>\n          <li>\n            <a
